recent_no_license_projects.name: easy-start-images
recent_no_license_projects.summary: easy_start_images 是一个用于图像处理的 Python 包，旨在简化常见的图像操作，如在图片上绘制文本、将 HTML 转换为图像等。该包提供了直观的 API，支持 Pillow 和 imgkit 两种图像处理库。

recent_bad_license_projects.name: vasprocar
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: VASProcar is an open-source package written in the Python 3 programming language, which aims to provide an intuitive tool for the post-processing of the output files produced by the DFT VASP/QE codes, through an interactive user interface.
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Augusto de Lelis Araujo and Renan da Paixao Maciel

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: easy-start-images
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: easy_start_images 是一个用于图像处理的 Python 包，旨在简化常见的图像操作，如在图片上绘制文本、将 HTML 转换为图像等。该包提供了直观的 API，支持 Pillow 和 imgkit 两种图像处理库。
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: guolei

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: vasprocar
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: VASProcar is an open-source package written in the Python 3 programming language, which aims to provide an intuitive tool for the post-processing of the output files produced by the DFT VASP/QE codes, through an interactive user interface.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Augusto de Lelis Araujo and Renan da Paixao Maciel

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: kreuzberg
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: High-performance document intelligence library for Python. Extract text, metadata, and structured data from PDFs, Office documents, images, and 50+ formats. Powered by Rust core for 10-50x speed improvements.

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: easy-start-chanjet
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: easy-start-chanjet 是一个为畅捷通中科华博系统提供集成接口的Python开发包，旨在简化与畅捷通中科华博API的交互过程，提供便捷的HTTP和WebService调用方式。
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: guolei

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: pyckster
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: A PyQt5-based GUI for picking seismic traveltimes
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Sylvain Pasquet

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: ftmq
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: followthemoney query dsl and io helpers
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Simon Wörpel

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: whttpserver
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: A simple HTTP server like `python -m http.server`
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: Wang Junbo
